response.justification: Bogdan is an accomplished full-stack engineer with 19 years of experience and proven leadership, clearly meeting baseline experience and education requirements. However, this Principal Engineer role specifically demands deep AI expertise and demonstrated products/platforms built with AI—core requirements absent from his resume. While his current MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work is promising, it appears to be infrastructure tooling rather than strategic AI product development. His resume lacks evidence of the strategic advisory, customer-facing, or AI innovation leadership expected at director-level. He could develop into this role but currently underqualifies for the AI strategy focus.
strengths: 19 years across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure domains with staff-level engineering and founder experience demonstrating seasoned technical judgment
Polyglot expertise (TypeScript, D, Java, C++) and recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP, AI-agent frameworks) showing adaptability and emerging AI awareness
Strong mentoring and thought leadership through workshops, open-source projects (GISCollective), and organizational knowledge-sharing initiatives
concerns: No demonstrated deep AI/ML expertise or record of building AI-powered products—a stated core requirement for principal-level AI strategy role
Limited strategic advisory or customer-facing experience with cutting-edge technologies, which is central to advising partners on cloud and AI adoption
Recent AI exposure appears confined to infrastructure tooling rather than strategic innovation or AI product development leadership

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and product track record gap
19 years experience with staff/founder-level IC background
Recent AI infrastructure exposure and adaptability across domains
